overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a smooth drone camera movement beginning near a seated character on a graffiti-covered concrete slope, then traveling down a desert urban drainage canal filled with trash, shallow water, and abandoned vehicles, with power transmission towers lining the route.

events.description: camera begins moving forward away from the seated character toward the canal

agents.ego_description: departing from the seated figure and descending toward the drainage canal

notable_agents.action: seated character wearing a beanie and casual clothes, holding a drink on the concrete slope

entered.detail: steep concrete embankment with red and black graffiti tags
concrete retaining wall covered in large red graffiti
rusted metal trash barrel sitting on the slope
high voltage transmission towers and cables running parallel to the canal

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a seated character resting on a graffiti-covered concrete slope in a desert urban environment. The camera begins a smooth forward movement, leaving the character behind as it descends toward a drainage canal, with power lines visible in the distance against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete drainage canal with scattered debris

events.description: camera enters the canal bed from the sloped embankment
passing abandoned yellow vehicle partially buried in trash on the right

agents.ego_description: moving steadily down the center of the drainage canal over concrete and shallow water

entered.detail: tall concrete walls lining both sides of the drainage channel
thin stream of water running down the center of the canal bed
piles of blue garbage bags, tires, and scattered debris
derelict yellow sedan partially submerged in trash

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the concrete drainage canal, moving between graffiti-covered walls under a bright sun. Shallow water covers the canal center as the camera passes piles of blue trash bags and an abandoned yellow car, with power transmission towers growing larger on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: mid-section drainage canal with power lines

events.description: water depth increases, covering more of the canal floor with reflective surface
passing red and white striped concrete barrier with NO RETURN graffiti

agents.ego_description: continuing down the canal through increasingly water-covered terrain with prominent power towers

entered.detail: wrecked red pickup truck visible in the distance ahead
red and white striped concrete barrier blocks on the left bank
tall modern street lamps along the right wall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the canal, the water now covers most of the ground, reflecting the clear sky. The camera passes a red and white striped barrier with NO RETURN painted on it, while power towers loom closer on the left and a wrecked red truck becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: trash-filled lower canal approaching wrecked vehicle

events.description: water appears more polluted with reddish-brown tint and floating debris
slowing approach toward the abandoned red truck blocking the canal

agents.ego_description: approaching the wrecked red truck through deep trash and murky water

entered.detail: large mound of garbage bags and debris accumulated on the left bank
distant desert mountains visible at the end of the canal

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera approaching the wrecked red truck through increasingly trash-filled and murky reddish water. Large trash heaps line both sides of the canal as the concrete walls recede into the distance, with desert mountains visible beyond the abandoned vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a graffiti-covered slope into a desolate, trash-strewn urban drainage canal. It begins by moving away from a seated character on a concrete incline, gliding downward toward a canal under a clear blue sky with distant power lines. As the camera enters the concrete channel, the environment shifts to a sun-drenched corridor of graffiti-covered walls, passing blue trash bags and an abandoned yellow car while power transmission towers loom larger on the left. The scene then expands as the camera moves deeper into the canal, where the ground becomes covered in reflective shallow water and passes a red and white striped barrier marked NO RETURN. Finally, the camera pushes through increasingly murky reddish water and large heaps of debris toward a wrecked red truck, with desert mountains appearing in the distance beyond the abandoned vehicle.
